Queen Hyrri knew that... she chooses to battle still, somewhere
beyond Hinekora's sight. There must be a very good reason."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Releases several tendrils of blood from your character, targeting enemies in a narrow angle in front of you. Fires tendrils at up to 9 Targets
